scenarios.description: children() reconstructs shadow cache when existing WeakReference referent has been cleared (shadowChildrenRef!=null and referent==null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Element with one child and existing shadowChildrenRef built, then referent manually cleared via reflection
scenarios.expectedResult: children() returns a fresh Elements list with the single child after cache miss
pseudocode: TEST TC08 children cache-rebuild on null referent
// clear referent: set shadowChildrenRef to new WeakReference<>(null)
